title: One Foot in the Grave (miniquest)

startPoint.en: Talk to Zavistic Rarve at the Wizards' Guild with Clarence's hand in your backpack.

items.name: Hand (Back to my Roots)
items.display: Hand (from the Back to my Roots quest) If lost, you can get a new one as a drop from creatures at the jade vine maze

items.name: Jade vine maze
items.display: If lost, you can get a new one as a drop from creatures at the jade vine maze

kills: Monsters in the jade vine maze (level 42 to level 84)

text.en: You may obtain one from an RPDT employee in East Ardougne or by killing creatures in the jade vine maze (at least one empty backpack space is required to obtain it as a drop).
With the hand, head to the Wizards' Guild in Yanille and ring the bell outside on the eastern side of the guild.
Speak to Zavistic Rarve. (opciones de chat: 2 I have a rather sandy problem that I'd like to palm off on you • Accept)
Before you begin, search your bank for already-obtained body parts listed below and withdraw them now.
Go to the Jade vine maze on Karamja.

Kill creatures inside the maze until you receive the six body parts. These do not show up on area loot, the pieces drop in order and you must pick up the piece prior to the next drop or duplicates drop. Ensure your backpack is never full as pieces cannot drop if it is.
Go back to the Wizards' Guild and ring the bell to speak to Zavistic Rarve. (opciones de chat: 2 I have a rather sandy problem that I'd like to palm off on you. • 1 Yes, I'm ready to go.)
Search Sandy's desk to receive a locked diary.
Click on the locked diary to unlock it.
There is a rare chance that you may trigger a trap so it is advised you do this in a safe area as it can cause over 8,000 damage.
Return to the Wizards' Guild and ring the bell to speak to Zavistic Rarve. (opciones de chat: 2 I have a rather sandy problem that I'd like to palm off on you. • 1 Sure, I'd be honoured to attend.)
